sources.title: THE 3v3 GRIND BEGINS! - Midnight Season 1 Arena
sources.notes: Example Midnight Season 1 arena VOD for offline fingerprint training. Label segments you hear clearly; adjust timestamps after listening.

segments.label: arena_gate_open_pressure
segments.notes: Example: commit when gate opens and team stacks

segments.label: defensive_cooldown_reset
segments.notes: Example: kite or line when defensive window is spent

segments.label: unclear_trash_audio
segments.notes: Discard or relabel if not a reliable cue
